title: UCLM's Robothon Team: From Innovation to Victory with 1st Runner-Up
summary: 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝗴𝗿𝗮𝘁𝘂𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀, UCLM Robothon Team—Dan Jerryl Almaden, Carlos Miguel Guia, and Niñobert Suello—on securing 1st Runner-Up at the Regional CpE Challenge 2024! Your innovation and perseverance have brought pride to the university and demonstrated the power of collaboration. We also commend Engr. Jean Careen Engkong for her unwavering support and guidance throughout this journey. As you look forward to upcoming challenges, we wish you continued success and greatness. Thank you for representing UCLM with excellence. 🙌🏆
author: ICPEP SE - UCLM Chapter
caption: ICPEP SE - UCLM Chapter

title: CESAFI Current Events and General Information Quiz 2026
summary: The CESAFI Current Events and General Information Quiz 2026 was successfully held at the University of Cebu – Lapu-Lapu and Mandaue (UCLM) on March 25, 2026, from 8:00 AM to 4:20 PM. The event gathered brilliant students from different universities who showcased their knowledge, critical thinking, and awareness of current events. We would like to extend our sincere congratulations and appreciation to our representatives Kat Campos, Rob Deniel Flores, and Kurt Andrew Mayormita, together with their coach Engr. Darwin Espera, for proudly representing UCLM and giving their best in the competition. Your dedication, teamwork, and effort truly make us proud!
author: Engineering Council - UCLM
caption: Reizel Tagarao

title: 𝗘𝗡𝗚𝗜𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗣 𝗜𝗦 𝗜𝗡❗️🔥

summary: Congratulations to our representative, Aljen Estenzo, for demonstrating outstanding focus, vocabulary, and confidence during the Spelling Bee competition at Intramurals 2026. The Engineering community is incredibly proud of your 2nd Place achievement!

title: 𝐀 𝐇𝐀𝐑𝐃-𝐅𝐎𝐔𝐆𝐇𝐓 𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐂𝐇 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐀 𝐖𝐄𝐋𝐋-𝐄𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐄𝐃 𝟐𝐍𝐃 𝐏𝐋𝐀𝐂𝐄 𝐈𝐍 𝐕𝐀𝐋𝐎𝐑𝐀𝐍𝐓 𝐓𝐎𝐔𝐑𝐍𝐀𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓
summary: The Valorant Team of the College of Engineering takes second place in the tournament. From pistol rounds to sniper shots, they aced the battlefield with precision, teamwork, and clutch plays.  Composed of Adrian Villaverde, Charl Den Ybañez, Jamir James Engracial, Leister Angelo Lobetaña, Ivan Ray Malubay, and Jethro Paciencia, the team secured second place falls short from CCS, who took first place, and ahead of BSCA who got third place.  Second place is not just an “almost first”—it’s a battle-tested achievement that reflects your skill, dedication, and teamwork. Congratulations to our Valorant warriors for making the College of Engineering proud!
author: Engineering Council - UCLM
caption: Gracezil Gonzales

title: Computer Engineering Graduates!
summary: Today, we celebrate more than a milestone—we celebrate the journey behind it. The long nights of debugging, the challenges that tested your patience, and the determination that kept you moving forward have all led to this moment. To our Summer and 1st Semester graduates, your hard work and perseverance have truly paid off. You have proven that growth comes from persistence, courage, and the willingness to keep learning even when the path feels difficult. Your journey stands as an inspiration to everyone who follows in your footsteps. On behalf of all the Computer Engineering students of the University of Cebu Lapu-Lapu and Mandaue and the ICpEP.se Organization, we are incredibly proud of you. Congratulations on this well-deserved achievement. May this be the beginning of even greater successes as you step boldly into the future. 🎓💙
author: ICPEP SE - UCLM Chapter
caption: ICPEP SE - UCLM Chapter

title: 🚀 1st Session of Java Coding Tutorial Successfully Conducted! 💻
summary: A big thank you to everyone who participated in the 1st Session of the ICpEP Coding Tutorial! The session was filled with learning, collaboration, and the excitement of exploring the fundamentals of programming. Participants had the opportunity to strengthen their coding skills, ask questions, and gain valuable insights from our tutors. This marks the beginning of more learning opportunities for aspiring developers and future Computer Engineers. 👏 Special thanks to our tutors and organizers who made this session possible! Stay tuned for more tutorials and activities from ICpEP as we continue to empower students through technology and innovation.
author: ICPEP SE - UCLM Chapter
caption: ICPEP SE - UCLM Chapter

title: 🤖💻 Cisco & Robotics Skills Competition 2026 🚀
summary: Innovation, teamwork, and technical excellence took center stage last Monday at the CBE Grounds as students showcased their skills during the Cisco and Robotics Skills Competition! This exciting event was made possible through the collaboration of the Senior High School, College of Engineering, and College of Computer Studies, bringing together passionate minds ready to take on real-world challenges in networking, automation, and robotics. With the support of Cisco Networking Academy, participants demonstrated not only their technical abilities, but also their creativity, problem-solving skills, and competitive spirit. 👏 Congratulations to all participants, organizers, and supporters for making this event a huge success. The future of tech is bright—and it starts here!
author: ICPEP SE - UCLM Chapter
caption: ICPEP SE - UCLM Chapter
